description_long: This is a double-headed battle axe with a striking, fantasy-inspired design. The blade is wide, symmetrical, and features intricate engravings and a central motif resembling a stylized bird or eagle with outstretched wings. The blade is a deep blue color, giving it a mystical or ceremonial appearance, and the edges are sharp and slightly curved. The handle is long, straight, and appears to be made of wood or a wood-like material, capped with metallic fittings at both ends for reinforcement and grip. The overall construction suggests it is both decorative and functional, suitable for display or use in themed urban events or parades. The craftsmanship and detailing indicate a high-quality, possibly custom-made piece.
description: A double-headed, blue-bladed battle axe with intricate engravings and a long, reinforced handle. The design is ornate and fantasy-inspired, blending decorative and functional elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full double-headed blade with detailed engravings and the central bird motif.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and the straightness of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the symmetrical blade and handle details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim edge of the blade and the cylindrical handle.
attribute_handle_type: Long, straight cylindrical handle, likely wood with metallic end caps and a textured grip section.
attribute_blade_design: Double-headed, wide symmetrical blade with sharp curved edges, central bird motif, and ornate engravings.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with visible reinforcement at the blade-handle junction.
